reasoning: The control 'Managing Information Security In The ICT Supply Chain' emphasizes ensuring security across the supply chain, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by enforcing least privilege access (RBAC), securing network ingress (NetworkPolicies), ensuring container image security (image scanning), and enforcing security policies at admission (Admission Controllers). These controls help manage security risks associated with third-party components and services integrated into the Kubernetes environment.
title: Managing Information Security In The ICT Supply Chain
